history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A person takes a mirror selfie in a warmly lit room, with shelves and kitchen items visible behind them.

Main Subject:
A person is shown from the torso up, holding a phone up to their face to take a mirror selfie. Their dark hair is styled with volume, and they wear small earrings, a black short-sleeve top, a bracelet on one wrist, and a watch on the other wrist. Their head is turned slightly to the side, and their face is partially obscured by the phone screen.

Setting:
The scene appears indoors in a room that blends into a kitchen or kitchen-like storage area. Warm yellow light comes from the left side, casting a glow on nearby surfaces and the person’s profile. In the background, shelves are mounted on the wall with woven baskets, bottles, and other kitchen items.

Visual Details:
The phone case is light-colored and has a camera cluster visible at the top. A golden decorative item or dried plant with feathery-looking texture appears behind the person near the left side. The shelves on the right contain multiple woven baskets stacked in tiers, with bottles and small containers among them. A wooden board and hanging utensils are visible on the right side, and a countertop area with jars or containers appears lower in the background. The camera angle is straight-on and close, focused on the person in the foreground while the background shelves and counter remain recognizable.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a mirror selfie of a person wearing a black shirt and accessories, holding a phone in front of their face. Behind them are wall shelves with woven baskets and various kitchen items under warm lighting.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No readable text appears to be present in the screenshot.]

# Structured Version

- **Text content:** None detected / not readable.

# Notes

- The image appears to be a photo with no visible UI text, captions, labels, or documents.
- If there’s specific text you want extracted (e.g., a sign or label), please upload a closer/clearer screenshot focusing on that area.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young East Asian man with short, dark, styled hair takes a mirror selfie indoors. He is wearing a plain black t-shirt and dark pants adorned with a silver chain. He has several silver rings on his fingers and a silver bracelet on his left wrist. He is holding a smartphone in his right hand, obscuring part of his face.

The background appears to be a kitchen or dining area, reflected in a large mirror. To the left, a warm-toned lamp with a cream-colored shade illuminates a shelf with some items. Behind the man, a stainless steel range hood is visible, with a decorative arrangement of dried yellow and orange flowers to its left. Further back, on shelves, are woven baskets, jars of preserves, and a wooden cutting board. A Christmas tree with golden ornaments and fairy lights is partially visible on the right side of the frame.

The lighting is soft and warm, primarily coming from the lamp, creating a cozy and intimate atmosphere. The color palette is dominated by dark tones of black and grey from the man's clothing and the background elements, contrasted by the warm yellows and oranges of the flowers and lamp, and the metallic sheen of his jewelry. The mood is casual and stylish, with a hint of personal flair suggested by his accessories. The overall style is a realistic, candid shot.
